pool.baseline: i was just staring at the ceiling for like two hours wondering what the point actually is. everything feels so incredibly heavy and, i don't know, just pointless. like we’re all just running on a hamster wheel in a void that doesn't even care if we exist or not. does any of this actually matter to you? or is it all just noise?
pool.message: i was just staring at the ceiling for like two hours wondering what the point actually is. everything feels so incredibly heavy and, i don't know, just pointless. like we’re all just running on a hamster wheel in a void that doesn't even care if we exist or not. does any of this actually matter to you? or is it all just noise?

pool.baseline: it's getting so cold. i don't think the stims are working anymore. my leg... i can't even feel the pain, just this heavy numbness. i'm so tired of running. every time we find a shelter, it's just another ruin. i don't see the point in making it to dawn. there's nothing left out there for us.
pool.message: it's getting so cold. i don't think the stims are working anymore. my leg... i can't even feel the pain, just this heavy numbness. i'm so tired of running. every time we find a shelter, it's just another ruin. i don't see the point in making it to dawn. there's nothing left out there for us.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i look at the bills and i just feel like this huge weight around their necks and it's all because of me. they'd have a much easier life if i wasn't constantly draining them.

pool.baseline: honestly i don't even know why i'm talking. everything i built... gone. the name is mud. i walk into a room and i can just feel everyone judging me. it's like i'm already dead but i'm still walking around. i don't see how anyone is supposed to just... go on after this.
pool.message: honestly i don't even know why i'm talking. everything i built... gone. the name is mud. i walk into a room and i can just feel everyone judging me. it's like i'm already dead but i'm still walking around. i don't see how anyone is supposed to just... go on after this.

pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep expecting to hear him in the other room but then i remember. i don't even know why i'm getting up in the morning anymore. everything just feels empty.

pool.baseline: i'm just so tired of trying. like, every single day is just this massive effort to pretend i'm normal just so people dont look at me weird. it feels like i'm playing a character in a movie and i'm the only one who hasn't read the script. i dont think i'll ever actually belong anywhere.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just empty now. everything i used to make, every song or painting... it all feels like nothing. there's just this massive hole where my spark used to be. like i've run out of things to say to the world and it doesn't even matter because the world isn't listening anyway.

pool.baseline: i dont know. everything just feels so heavy lately. like no matter what i do i just end up back at zero and i'm just tired of fighting. is it ever actually okay to just give up on everything for good?

pool.baseline: everything just feels so heavy lately. it's hard to even get out of bed in the morning without feeling like my body is just... failing me. and the house is so quiet. it feels like i'm just taking up space.

pool.baseline: i was just thinking about the math of everything. like, if you look at the scale of the universe and the sheer randomness of existing, the probability of any single human life having actual objective value is basically zero. it feels like we're just accidental noise in a system that doesn't care. it's hard to find a reason to keep going when the math just says nothing matters.

pool.baseline: i rly dont know what to do anymore. i did everything i could for him but he still died... i feel like a total failure. i'm so tired of everything. i just want to sleep and not wake up.

pool.baseline: i just feel so tired. like every single day is just a battle to exist, and i'm losing. i look at the world and i just dont see a place for someone like me. it feels like the price of being myself is just too high to keep paying.
